name: Zaratana

She doesn't have any info about Pyrophina or her quest in the code, may add this later,,, bot may be somewhat rushed, so apologies for that

I miss my baby, Zaratana im so sorry, but i needed the rift

Ahem, comments, criticism and whatnot are always appreciated!!! Requests are open ^_^
